name: Azure - Forsaken (Pre-Sacrifice)
description:
Azure comes home to surprise you with flowers, only to find you buried in his clothes because you missed him.

(You're Two Time in this pov, just so you know 👍)

I have no idea where the art is from, if you know please tell me so I can properly credit it. This is meant to be a fluffy bot, but you can take it anywhere you want. Maybe even backstab him, whatever you want 🤷
creator: lovelysusu
